calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To File Under Seal The Declaration In Support Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Donald Carter, MD's unopposed Motion To File Under Seal The Declaration In Support Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement is DENIED.

(see word minutes)

Moving Party must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving Party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Moving Party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
